userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add measurements: delay from CH4 rising to CH1 crossing 100mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.

actionsJson.summary: Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.

steps.label: Set Trigger on CH4 Rising Edge 1V Normal Mode
Set Single Sequence Acquisition, 10M Record Length
Add Delay Measurement: CH4 Rising to CH1 100mV

params.command: MEASU:ADDMEAS DELAY;MEASU:MEAS1:SOURCE1 CH4;MEASU:MEAS1:SOURCE2 CH1;MEASU:MEAS1:EDGE1 RIS;MEASU:MEAS1:EDGE2 CROSS;MEASU:MEAS1:THRESH2 0.1

steps.label: Add Delay Measurement: CH4 Rising to CH2 250mV

params.command: MEASU:ADDMEAS DELAY;MEASU:MEAS2:SOURCE1 CH4;MEASU:MEAS2:SOURCE2 CH2;MEASU:MEAS2:EDGE1 RIS;MEASU:MEAS2:EDGE2 CROSS;MEASU:MEAS2:THRESH2 0.25

steps.label: Add Delay Measurement: CH4 Rising to CH3 500mV

params.command: MEASU:ADDMEAS DELAY;MEASU:MEAS3:SOURCE1 CH4;MEASU:MEAS3:SOURCE2 CH3;MEASU:MEAS3:EDGE1 RIS;MEASU:MEAS3:EDGE2 CROSS;MEASU:MEAS3:THRESH2 0.5

steps.label: Add Pk2Pk and Mean on CH1
Add Pk2Pk and Mean on CH2
Add Pk2Pk and Mean on CH3
